issues.field: departure point, destination, dates of travel
issues.description: The receipt does not include the departure point, destination, and dates of travel.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Transportation cost invoices must include details of departure point, destination, dates of travel

issues.description: The receipt does not include the transport company details such as the name of the bus, tax code, and address of the headquarter.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Bus tickets must show Transport company details including Name of Bus, Tax code, Address of Headquarter

issues.field: local employer details on VAT/Red invoice
issues.description: The receipt does not include the local employer details for GOGLOBAL VIETNAM COMPANY LIMITED.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: VAT/Red invoice must show: GOGLOBAL VIETNAM COMPANY LIMITED, Tax Code: 0315261446, Address: Tầng 1, tòa nhà Packsimex, 52 Đồng Du, Phường Bến Nghé, Quận 1, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh City

issues.description: The receipt is for transportation expenses but does not include the boarding pass, flight ticket, and a red invoice as required for flight expenses.
issues.recommendation: Please provide the boarding pass, flight ticket, and a red invoice for flight expenses.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Air Ticket claims must include the Boarding Pass, the flight ticket and a red invoice

issues.description: The receipt is for ground transportation but does not include both invoices and trip details as required for expenses using apps like Grab/Bee.
issues.recommendation: Please provide both invoices and trip details for ground transportation expenses using apps like Grab/Bee.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: If the employee uses Grab/Bee or other apps to call a car, both invoices and trip details are necessary to be submitted

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues including missing mandatory fields such as departure point, destination, dates of travel, and transport company details. Additionally, the local employer details on the VAT/Red invoice are incomplete. Follow-up actions are required to provide additional documentation for flight and ground transportation expenses.
